prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS turbocharger kit (V35A-FTS 3.4L twin-turbo V6) with Garrett GTX4202R turbos, HKS 260-lph fuel pumps, and AEM 2200cc injectors, paired with a custom ECU flash by Mine's to target 650whp on E85 fuel while retaining OEM torque curve smoothness

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken twin-plate clutch (LX600-specific), KAAZ 1.5-way LSD for the rear differential, and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly) to handle increased torque without NVH compromise

Suspension overhaul with Tein EnduraPro coilovers (VIP-spec valving, 8kg/mm front/10kg/mm rear springs) paired with SPC Adjustable Upper Control Arms (LX600-specific) for -2.5° camber correction, complemented by Air Lift Performance 3P management for static-to-air ride height adjustability
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny LX600 VIP widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom matte PPF wrap in 'Deep Space Black' by 3M, featuring integrated LED turn signals and a carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors

OEM+ VIP interior overhaul: Recaro SR-7F seats (LX600-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with 'Lexus Red' stitching, paired with a custom rear lounge setup (split 60/40 reclining seats with built-in massagers) by Japan's premier VIP builder, 'Toyota Customizing & Development' (TCD)

Lighting and aero package: Valenti JDM-spec LED headlights (LX600-compatible, sequential turn signals), custom carbon fiber rear diffuser by Seibon with integrated dual 4-inch exhaust tips (stainless steel, quad-exit), and a Vorsteiner carbon fiber roof spoiler (VRT-1000) for downforce at VIP cruising speeds
